EXL | StarPulse · Medicare Stars Platform

Close every gap.
Reach 4★ and beyond.

StarPulse is an AI-powered Medicare Stars platform that identifies member gaps, automates outreach campaigns, and projects your CMS star rating — across all domains, in real time.

Executive Overview
Monitor all top contracts by enrollment, compare PY to Projected ratings, and identify underperforming plans.
Market Analysis
Analyze CMS enrollment trends, compare plan star ratings, and identify market opportunities across organizations and contracts.
Platform Capabilities
HEDIS Clinical Quality
Leverage AI to monitor HEDIS measures, pinpoint gaps, and engage members.
Explore →
CAHPS Member Experience
Analyze CAHPS survey data to uncover drivers of member satisfaction.
Explore →
HOS Health Outcomes
Track physical and mental health outcomes to support star rating goals.
Explore →
Medical Adherence
Monitor PDC-based adherence and close pharmacy gaps.
Explore →
Admin / Operational
Track appeals, call center access, quality scores, and complaints.
Explore →
Quick Navigation
Simulator
Model scenarios and see their impact on Star ratings in real-time.
Launch →
Agent Execution
Manage outreach campaigns with tailored agent scripts.
Launch →
Impact Projector
Simulate closure rates and visualize the lift of reaching 4★.
Launch →
Campaign History & ROI
Track campaigns, measuring performance, cost, and ROI.
Launch →
Alerts & Priorities
Stay on top of critical measure drops and prioritized action items.
Launch →

Critical Alerts
🚨
SPC – Statin Therapy: CRITICAL (55% · needs 70%)
Gap of 15 points. 412 members without statin.
Est. cost to close: $9,064 · CMS impact: HIGH
🚨
AMM – Antidepressant Mgmt: CRITICAL (52% · needs 70%)
Lowest performing HEDIS measure. 283 members need follow-up.
Est. cost to close: $6,226 · CMS impact: HIGH
⚠️
COL – Colorectal Screening: AT RISK (58% · needs 65%)
7 point gap. 356 members need colorectal screening. SMS recommended.
Est. cost to close: $1,424 · Deadline: Dec 31
⚠️
CDC – A1c Control: AT RISK (64% · needs 70%)
89 claims lag pending. Monitor closely over next 30 days.
Re-check date: Nov 15
💡
Opportunity: 9 members away from 4★ + $2.4M CMS bonus
Closing just 9 more members across COL and SPC moves compliance to 70%.
📅
Measurement period snapshot in 83 days
CMS HEDIS snapshot Oct 15. All closures must be in claims by this date.
Impacted: COL, CDC, SPC, AMM

days remaining

EHO4all reward tracker — 2025
Earned: +0.2★ Remaining potential: +0.2★ Maximum: +0.4★
0★+0.2★ current+0.4★ max
What closing the remaining gap means
Closing the 3 below-benchmark measures (medication adherence–diabetes, colorectal screening, breast cancer screening for LIS members) would earn the remaining +0.2★, pushing overall rating from 3.8★ → 4.2★ when combined with existing HEDIS progress.

Campaigns created for open gap members
No campaigns created yet.
Urgency Engine
How the agent scores open-gap members to determine who gets called first
How it works
The agent assigns a composite urgency score (0–100) to each member with an open gap. Care management works the list from highest score down, ensuring the most at-risk members are contacted first. The score is recalculated nightly as new claims and EHR data flows in.
Urgency score factors — weights and data sources
FactorWeightWhat is measuredData sourceHigh urgency triggers
Loading...
How the score is calculated
High urgency
70–100
→ Care management priority call
Medium urgency
40–69
→ Care mgmt or outreach call
Low urgency
0–39
→ Outreach call or pre-survey reminder
Score distribution — open gap members
